response:
Pandas and Numpy are used to process rental data for Miami properties. Mean rental prices are calculated to show average values. Median and standard deviation are computed to measure central tendency and variability. Outliers are identified using Z-scores. * * *  
Data is cleaned and structured for analysis. Properties are categorized into types like single family homes and condos. Mean prices are compared across categories. Visualizations show distribution patterns. * * *  
Outliers are removed to improve accuracy. Analysis highlights trends in different property types. Matplotlib creates a histogram of rental prices. * * *
